name: sensorReverseBits
title: sensorReverseBits
syntax: SensorErrorCode sensorReverseBits(byte buffer[], dword bufferByteCount, dword bitCount);
description: Reverses the given number of bits in the given array.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: The array in which the bits shall be reversed.

parameters.name: bufferByteCount
parameters.description: The length of the array in bytes.

parameters.name: bitCount
parameters.description: The number of bits in the array that shall be reversed.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
